{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Blood Icon
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Icon]] is an icon that resonates with truth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Blood Icon]] is an icon that [[Sages]] are tied to.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
